highlights.description: Cross-protocol bridging: New `bridge/` package enables interoperability between ID-JAG, AIMS, and AAuth
Observability integration: New `bridge/observe/` package with distributed tracing, metrics, and logging via OmniObserve
Protocol-bridge demo: Working example demonstrating multi-protocol authentication

added.description: `bridge/` package with canonical identity and cross-protocol converters
`bridge.Identity` canonical representation for protocol-agnostic code
`bridge.DetectProtocol()` for automatic protocol detection from JWT typ header
`bridge.Parse()` for unified token parsing across protocols
`bridge.MultiProtocolMiddleware()` HTTP handler accepting any protocol
`bridge/observe/` package for OmniObserve integration
`observe.Middleware()` with distributed tracing, metrics, and logging
`observe.DelegationTracker` for delegation chain tracing
`demos/protocol-bridge/` cross-protocol demo application

documentation.description: Bridge package documentation
OAuth to Agent migration guide
Hybrid authentication guide
Updated roadmap with Phase 7 and 8 progress

highlights.description: AIMS: Token parsing and verification with WITVerifier and WPTVerifier
AAuth: JWT typ header validation and context-aware verification methods
ID-JAG: IETF-compliant token types and IdP authorization server

added.description: AIMS `ParseWIT` and `ParseWPT` functions for token inspection without verification
AIMS `WITVerifier` for cryptographic WIT signature verification with issuer/audience validation
AIMS `WPTVerifier` for WPT verification including HTTP request binding checks
AIMS `TokenTypeWIT` and `TokenTypeWPT` constants per WIMSE specification
AAuth `validateTokenType` function for JWT typ header validation in token parsers
ID-JAG IETF-compliant token type constants and JWT header values
ID-JAG required IETF claims (`client_id`, `jti`) in Assertion struct
ID-JAG `IdPAuthServer` for OAuth token exchange at identity providers
ID-JAG token type acceptance in Resource authorization server
Integration test script (`scripts/integration-test.sh`) for running all examples

changed.description: **BREAKING**: AAuth `AuthServer.validateExchangeRequest` now accepts `context.Context` for proper cancellation
AIMS `signingMethodForKey` properly detects RSA, ECDSA (P-256/384/521), and Ed25519 keys
AIMS WIT and WPT signing now sets `typ` header per WIMSE specification

fixed.description: SharkAuth DPoP `parseJWKPublicKey` now properly parses RSA, EC, and OKP keys using aauth.JWK
AAuth request body size limit (1MB) prevents memory exhaustion in AuthServer

documentation.description: AIMS package documentation for parsing and verification APIs
AAuth package documentation for context-aware verification methods
Project roadmap documenting release history and future phases
README Development section with test, lint, and integration commands
ID-JAG datasheet updated for IETF compliance
ID-JAG delegation example updated for IETF-compliant flow

tests.description: AIMS parsing and verification tests for WIT and WPT
AAuth typ header validation tests for all token types
SharkAuth DPoP proof verification tests for EC and RSA keys

added.description: SharkAuth adapter (`adapters/sharkauth/`) for agent delegation infrastructure
RFC 8693 Token Exchange client for SharkAuth
DPoP proof-of-possession binding per RFC 9449
`may_act_grants` API for structured delegation with cascade revocation
SharkAuth example: AAuth agent integration with delegation grants
Ory adapter (`adapters/ory/`) for Fosite and Hydra integration
Custom Fosite OAuth handlers for ID-JAG assertions and AAuth tokens
Token storage interface with in-memory implementation for Fosite
Hydra client for public and admin APIs with token exchange support
JWT Bearer grant support (RFC 7523) for Hydra
Token introspection with actor claim support for delegation
Ory example: ID-JAG assertion exchange with mock Hydra server

added.description: AAuth library (`aauth/`) implementing draft-hardt-oauth-aauth-protocol
HTTP message signatures (RFC 9421) for request authentication
AAuth token types: `aa-agent+jwt` and `aa-auth+jwt`
Agent client with automatic request signing transport
Resource server middleware for AAuth token validation
Auth server with token exchange and JWKS endpoints
Discovery client for AAuth metadata retrieval
AAuth examples: simple agent, delegation, token exchange
AAuth delegation example with Person Server flow
PIDL definitions for AAuth protocol flows
Zitadel adapter (`adapters/zitadel/`) for production OIDC integration

HTTP middleware for Zitadel token validation
Zitadel example applications for each protocol

highlights.description: Initial release with ID-JAG and AIMS protocol implementations for AI agent authentication
ID-JAG: OAuth 2.0 token exchange with JWT assertions and human-to-agent delegation support
AIMS: SPIFFE-based workload identity with WIT/WPT authentication per WIMSE specification

added.description: ID-JAG library (`idjag/`) implementing draft-ietf-oauth-identity-assertion-authz-grant
JWT assertion creation and signing with RS256/ES256 support
Token exchange client for RFC 8693 token exchange flow
JWT Bearer client for RFC 7523 JWT bearer grant
Authorization server with JWKS endpoint for assertion verification
Resource server middleware for Bearer token validation
Actor claim (`act`) support for human-to-agent delegation chains
Static key and JWKS-based JWT verifiers
AIMS library (`aims/`) implementing draft-klrc-aiagent-auth-00
SPIFFE ID parsing and validation with trust domain support
Nine-layer AIMS architecture model
AgentIdentity type combining SPIFFE ID, credentials, and attestation
Workload Identity Token (WIT) per draft-ietf-wimse-s2s-protocol
WIMSE Proof Token (WPT) with HTTP request binding
X.509 SVID and JWT-SVID credential types
Attestation types: TPM, SGX, SEV-SNP, TDX, Kubernetes, AWS, GCP, Azure, GitHub
ID-JAG examples: simple agent flow and human-to-agent delegation
AIMS examples: simple WIT/WPT authentication and mTLS with X.509 SVID
PIDL definitions for ID-JAG flows (simple, delegation, token exchange)
PIDL definitions for AIMS flows (WIT issuance, WPT authentication)
